text:
Created attachment 195275
svn diff for security/acme.sh

```
security/acme.sh: Update to 2.7.9
```

FWIW: Had a renew error on Gandi LiveDNS API and whilst trying to figure out what the problem was, saw that a new version was available. I don't think the issue was in the version, but renewal works again.
